import string
import list
import io

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, -cur)
        else
          result = list.push(result, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let x = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not list.contains(result, x)
      mut j = 0
      mut inserted = false
      mut newres: List<Int> = []
      let m = result.len()
      while j < m
        let y = match result.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if not inserted and x < y
          newres = list.push(newres, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        newres = list.push(newres, y)
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not inserted
        newres = list.push(newres, x)
      end
      result = newres
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut combined: List<Int> = []
mut ia = 0
let na = a.len()
while ia < na
  let x = match a.get(ia)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  combined = list.push(combined, x)
  ia = ia + 1
end

mut ib = 0
let nb = b.len()
while ib < nb
  let x = match b.get(ib)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  combined = list.push(combined, x)
  ib = ib + 1
end

let u = sorted_unique(combined)

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let nu = u.len()
while k < nu
  let x = match u.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{x}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
